name: python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6
title: python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6
summary: D-Bus Qt main loop support for Python
description:
D-Bus Qt main loop support for Python
The dbus.mainloop.pyqt6 module provides support for Qt main loop for
applications that use dbus-python. By default Qt uses main loop from
GLib on UNIX-like systems, not its own one.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6 because D-Bus Qt main loop support for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dbus.mainloop.pyqt6 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
